title: citrus × sinensis var. myrtifolia
intro: Citrus × sinensis var. myrtifolia, also known as the 'Dwarf Washington' or 'Dwarf Navels' variety of the Chinese satsuma mandarin, is a type of dwarf citrus tree that belongs to the Rutaceae family. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and aid in digestion. The health benefits of Citrus × sinensis var. myrtifolia include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant properties that help protect against cell damage. Citrus × sinensis var. myrtifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or oil, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
